helpful: The provisioned full petition and questions presented made the certworthiness and vehicle defects assessable.
Paid-petition and CVSG base rates provided a useful calibration anchor.
gaps: CourtListener search throttling prevented one general legal-context query.
No brief in opposition was available because respondents waived response.
notes: The provisioned docket snapshot was sufficient for a conservative forecast. CourtListener results were sparse and did not materially change it.
